summary: Recent updates to the HLS (HTTP Live Streaming) component of Firefox improve how the browser handles streaming media formats. The changes include using **MOZ_LOG_FMT**, a logging feature that enhances debugging for container demuxers like webm, ogg, and mp3. This makes it easier to identify and fix issues related to these formats. Additionally, the HLS resource callbacks interface was expanded, allowing more efficient communication when opening HTTP channels. This enhancement is key for making video delivery smoother, maintaining a better user experience while watching streamed content.
